title: LexonElec Custom Coiled Keyboard Cable, 2.0M(0.66ft) USB-C to USB-A TPU Mechanical Keyboard Cable, Detachable Metal Aviator Double-Sleeved Wire for Gaming Keyboard(Orange)
features: 【High Quality and Durable】LexonElec custom coiled keyboard cable Uses four high-quality copper wires and aluminum shielding foil as the core, surface adopts metal and TPU. Professional reverse coil, strong and durable, not afraid of bending and will not break.

【Metal Aviation Connector】The aviator connector allows you to quickly attach different cables to your keyboard or other accessories. Screw-type plug-in lock, self-locking structure, strong connection and stable transmission. All-steel metal, full of texture, Enhance the keyboard experience.
【Professional reversed Coil】Coiled shape, more substantial, not easy to tangle. Even if it is overstretched, it will not only not be damaged but will quickly return to its original shape.

【High-speed Charging and Transfer】USB Type-C to USB-A cable supports safe and fast data synchronization and charging, USB cable is compatible with most USB C mechanical gaming keyboards or printers, PS4, Switch.

【Enough length】The length of the cable exceeds similar products on the market! 7.9 inches long with 20 mm Inner diameter coiled cable+1.1 meter straight cable. This length is enough to meet the distance of all keyboards. It will be a perfect replacement for your OEM or original cables with superior performance.

【Quality Assurance】 After a number of technical tests, including transmission stability, sturdy cables durability, resilience of coils, firm welding of the joints, heavy load test on connect and swing test. Each product you own is high -quality.

reviews.title: Very nice coiled keyboard cable.
reviews.text:
The cable came nicely coiled with no flaws. Plugs are high quality and the screw connection type is pretty heavy duty I don't see this breaking. Only wished the straight part of the cable was longer.

I highly recommend this cable for anyone looking for a custom looking cable that wont break the bank.

reviews.title: Works as advertised!
reviews.text: This cable worked exactly as advertised. My keyboard has a USB c connector, and it fit together perfectly. I love the look of this cable as it neatly tucks under my desk and doesn't leave any unnecessary excess hanging around. Overall very happy with this product!

reviews.title: Decent aviator cable for my keyboard setup.
reviews.text: These cables are an aesthetically great match for my “rebel scum” keyboard build.  The connections are tight and the materials used seems like they are great quality.  I don’t really have any complaints about the quality of this product.  I think it’s important to note these are not braided cables, and have a soft rubber feel, much like you would get on any standard USB type cable.

reviews.title: Good Quality!
reviews.text: Bright white coiled cable makes my desk look neater and organized. Matches my desk decor better. Keyboard response is the same as the original cable it came with, no complaints here.

reviews.title: Treat your keyboard to a nicer cable
reviews.text: What a nice cable, with solid metal USB plugs, a clean aviator connector, and tight and even coils. I got it in purple, to match some keycaps I like, and it looks perfect. The USB-C plug is about 5.5mm thick, so should fit most recessed plugs. I was able to charge every device I tried, even a chromebook (lenovo duet) and phone (pixel 6a).

title: YUNZII AKKO CS Switch, 3 Pins for DIY MX Mechanical Keyboard, 45 pcs (Ocean Blue Switch)
features: 【About AKKO CS Switches】 AKKO Custom Series (CS) switches are the newly designed 3-pin switches for customers who have specific typing and gaming needs. Each package has 45 switches. Six types of switches are available and no matter which kind of typing feeling you want, we cover it all.

【Compatibility】AKKO CS switches are designed with a general MX structure so that they can fit most keycaps sets. The switch has 3 pins but also fit in all 3 pins and 5 pins keyboards. Based on the strong compatibility, you can easily change the switch and customize your mechanical keyboard.
【Built-in LED Slot 】The AKKO CS switches are equipped with a north-facing LED slot for LED modification. It is also compatible with SMD LED, provides more fun and options for keyboard enthusiasts.

【Durable Lifespan & Improved Performance】With a lifespan of approximately 50 million times of keystrokes, you are assured of high quality and a long lifespan. The CS switches feature a spiral spring design that can make the typing more comfortable.

【Ocean Blue Tactile Switch】The tactile bump of the Ocean Blue switch is at 0.55mm and it ends at 1.88mm, which gives long-continued feedback. Different from the blue and brown switch, the Ocean blue switch has a medium tactile position that can give you an excellent experience in typing and gaming.

reviews.title: Very good for the price
reviews.text: I'm not a mechanical keyboard connoisseur, but needed to replace the switches on my cheap Redragon keyboard to get rid of the loud clicking noise. The original switches were blue switch clones and the clicks will wake up the neighbors. These are cheap enough that I decided to give them a try. They are pretty good in terms of touch and sound, from my perspective and my use. Will definitely resort to these again in the future if I need to replace keyboard switches, especially for budget keyboards.

title: dagaladoo XVX 189 Keys Double Shot Keycaps, PBT Custom Keyboard Keycaps Full Set, XVX Profile Keycaps for 60% 65% 70% 100% Cherry Gateron MX Switches Mechanical Keyboard, Black/Purple
features: Full 189 keys PBT keycaps set, including 108 standard keys, 61 supplementary keys and 20 invert color supplementary keys for most 61/64/66/68/84/87/96/98/100/104/108 mechanical keyboards.
Double shot design keycaps, made from two colors material molded into each others, make the keycaps characters maintain the vibrance and saturation, clear and not fade.
XVX profile keycaps, ergonomic height design similar than Cherry profile, while increasing the contact surface between the finger and keycaps, bring you a comfortable typing experience.
Made from high content PBT material, 0.2cm extra-thick keycaps wall, which is provide top-notch durability, excellent touch and grease resistance.
Minimalist theme style and classic color matching, with a large number of personalized complement keys, you can DIY different styles of keyboards according to your own ideas.

reviews.title: Fits Royal Kludge 90% and Keychron K10!
reviews.text: I like all the extras. The quality of the PBT is grainy in texture, so if that's the kind of thing you're in to, then these won't disappoint. Not shine through, although the advertisement never claims they are. No light is coming through these from your board. The XVX profile is nice. Many extra key options- this set has fit several boards from several brands- not something you see for the price point! Quality printing and nice font on the caps. The keys feel good to type on when used with a clicky or linear switch. They are a bit heavy, so a lighter switch wouldn't be a bad option. I don't like to use these on tactile switches due to the mushy that these caps add to the keys. O Rings did not help these keys IMO.

reviews.title: Random assortment of loose keys
reviews.text: Expected a full set of keycaps, instead received a box containing three bags of loose keys, missing multiple letters, numbers, function keys, etc. Might be good for a concept art project, but not for a working keyboard.

reviews.title: Some keys misaligned with switch stems.
reviews.text: The keys have a nice touch, sound and printing however some keys, particularly my "O" key are a misaligned with the switch stem causing it to stick up a little higher than the "I" and "P" on either side. I did not mistake a "0" for an "O".

reviews.title: Seem to be good quality, but I hate the XVX profile
reviews.text:
These seems to be good quality keycaps, I have no issues with them at all. I have put them on multiple boards now, and I haven't had any break or scratch. Colors are accurate and legends are clear. No complaints there.

My one gripe is the XVX profile. It takes a lot of getting used to (like any new profile would), but the surface area of the keys is much larger than most other profiles. Therefore, when typing, it feels as if your fingers have to travel significantly further to reach the next key. It also makes it much, much easier to fat finger extra keys. If I had realized how much more surface area there was, I would not have purchased these. However, they do look great, they were cheap, and they sound pretty good too.

reviews.title: Great keycaps, andd even better customer service!
reviews.text: I wanted to find some PBT keycaps that were double-shot and gave some aesthetic flair to my $15 108 full sized mech keyboard with brown switches.  They fit just fine, and give a different, yet, pleasing sounds and feel to the keyboard.  I wanted non-see through keycaps in order to hide most of the LED rainbow glare.  The backlit effect is, again, very pleasing.  The keycap set that I originally ordered was missing the F9 key.  I contacted their customer service through Amazon, and got a reply back right away and arranged for a replacement set to be shipped out.  Got it the new set the day after, and it was complete.  Will purchase from this seller again whenever I need/want new keycaps.  Very confident if something is wrong, will be taken care of in a timely matter.

title: MELETRIX WS Grey Tactile Mechanical Keyboard Lubed Switches(35pcs)
description: WS Grey Tactile Mechanical Keyboard Lubed Switches
features: Nylon Top and bottom housing, POM silent tactile stem
Double stage spring: 63.5g
Total travel: 3.50±0.3mm Pre-travel: 2.00±0.5mm Bottom-out force: 63.5
Factory lubed

reviews.title: Can be used stock!
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:528307786b36a4c2c9833ddd389101cb]] They come with a small amount of lube pre applied. Usually, prelubed switches are inconsistent in my experience but these ones are really good. I decided to not lube them at all. EDIT: got a few more batches, they're not as consistent. But seller was nice enough to get them replaced.

The stems are long pole. As a result, it has a nice bottom out sound.

It was noticeably heavier coming from a 50g switch to these that are 63g, but overtime I got adjusted and had no problems typing with them.

Overall a great buy, though I wish it was priced more competitively.

Using on Drop Preonic with MT3 Camillo, plateless, tape mod

reviews.title: Nice linears
reviews.text:
Starting off not sure who's at fault for this as it's only fulfilled by Amazon but one of my bags was missing a few switches (one bag was open and all the switches were rattling around inside the amazon pouch it arrived in) I counted 5 missing and there wasn't a silica gel packet either, the other bags were fine.
complaint aside they feel really nice and the factory lube seems to be well done as wish they had a "3 pin" option and different switch amounts 35 2 is too few and 3 is too many (unless some get lost in transit like mine lol) 90 would be a good option for the TKL/75% gang

reviews.title: Will be Using Right Away
reviews.text: In building & repairing computers these key switches are used very often. Mainly for high-end (over $100) keyboards that the serious gamers use. What they do is tough on the keyboards and often switches break or become less responsive which may lead to a gamer losing a match. These snap right in to the sockets and can instantly rebuild the whole keyboard like new. I realize they would not be used by your everyday person or casual gamer but when it gets serious they are  the switches to be used.

reviews.title: Nice Linear
reviews.text: These are nice and smooth and sound wonderful.  I'm not a linear fan usually, but I do like them in my modifier keys (shift, backspace, enter, and space) because I don't like the return sound a tactile makes while in a larger key.  These are perfect for that as they don't have a high pitch and there's no spring ping to even think of!  I would highly recommend them to anyone looking for a lighter-weight linear switch with some style.

reviews.title: Great Stock!
reviews.text: The switches sounds great and feels good to use. The lube in this is not bad at all and you don't hear any ping or scratchiness. The bottom out is much more than I am used to, but I do enjoy it otherwise.

reviews.title: Spacebar sticks occasionally.
reviews.text: The space bar sticks sometimes, but the actuation for is suitable for my sore index finger from using my mouse a lot. I am a smaller person, my hands fall between medium and small. I wanted something with a smaller key distance and slightly smaller keys for typing and this definitely fits the bill. It comes with some replacement switches, we'll see how long it takes to actually need to the switch.

reviews.title: I LOVE it!
reviews.text: Looks amazing in my set up and love the retro typewriter feel.

reviews.title: Hubby loves it!
reviews.text: So I initially got this for my parents, I mistakenly thought it was a wireless keyboard. IT IS NOT A WIRELESS KEYBOARD. However, I intended to take it back until my husband got a hold of it and loved the lights and the different patterns that can be done as well as the old fashioned typing clicks.

reviews.title: it doesn't make a clickety clakety sound like the old IBM keyboards, which I thought it would
reviews.text: I gave it to one of my grandkids, after buying a wrist rest for it. So I used it only once.

reviews.title: ❤🧡💛💚💙💜

reviews.title: Good color and works well.
reviews.text: Good color & works well.

title: VELOCIFIRE Keycap Puller Tool, 3 in 1 Keycap Puller, Stainless Steel Keycap Removal Tool, Key Pulling, Loosen, Tighten Keycap Stem, Expert for Mechanical Keyboard(Black)
features: This wire style keycap puller is a necessary tool for any mechanical keyboard owner. Easily remove and replace keycaps with this keycap removal tool.
Creative two-stage combination design, multifunctional keycap puller, one part is keycap puller, one part is keycap stem adjust.
You just need to place the keycap puller metal at the bottom of the keycap and pull the keycap out vertically.
Round body shape designed for maximum comfort.Compatible for most mechanical keyboards including Cherry MX，Kailh, Outemu, and Content Switches.

reviews.title: It's good, but it doesn't fit Daskeyboard keys
reviews.text: I have a das keyboard.  This doesn't fit over the keys.  I had to twist and bend it to make it work.  It's not the right tool for a das keyboard.  With that said, it's a good quality tool.  I would buy it again for something with smaller keys.  Just don't bother for the mechanical das keyboard.

title: TECWARE Phantom 87 Key Mechanical Keyboard, RGB led, Outemu Brown Switch
features: RGB BACKLIGHTING - Enhance your gaming experience with 18 pre-set configurations on the mechanical keyboard, or create a unique one to match your setup

OUTEMU SWITCHES - The gaming mechanical keyboard comes with Outemu mechanical switches for precise gaming and comfortable typing. Spare switches + keycap & switch remover tools are provided for easy replacement
FIBERGLASS PCB - Built with SMD LEDs and FR-4 fiberglass printed circuit board, this Tecware mechanical keyboard is able to withstand extended periods of intensive and hardcore gaming sessions

DOUBLE-SHOT KEYCAPS – Featuring an all-new font, the keycaps on this mechanical keyboard are double-shot ABS (dual-injection molding process) which guarantee high resistance against surface wear; markings that cannot be worn off as they are physically part of the keycaps

SPEED ADVANTAGE - With full N-key rollover and 1000Hz pooling rate, Tecware keyboards allow faster and smoother gaming experience. The depression of each key is detected individually, meaning all key presses will be registered, no matter how many keys you press down simultaneously

reviews.title: Great quality
reviews.text: Very bright lights. Click clack noise keys. Small the way I like it. Portable. Works great. Has usb cover cap too.

reviews.title: Excellent keyboard.
reviews.text: This is my first mechanical keyboard and I really love the quality of this keyboard. The LED's are bright and on keyboard LED controls are very useful as you don't have to depend on the software. The keyboard feels very premium and on par with any other expensive keyboard. I would highly recommend this to others looking for new mechanical keyboard.

reviews.title: the smaller one with the browns... i love it
reviews.text: ok the onboard RGB stuff is really why i bought this. Its not Razer RGB but for +/- 50 bucks? oh hell yea. The keys are great, if your used to others it might take a sec to get accustomed, but if you use it your fingers will get to know it real nice :) Solid thru and thru.

reviews.title: Yes
reviews.text: Custom color mapping, might need to buy some more resistant switches for keys near my palms.. or I could learn to type properly. Either way, I approve.

reviews.title: Great colors
reviews.text: Exactly what my son wanted.  Color control is amazing.

title: Wireless 60% Mechanical Gaming Keyboard, 3 Connection Mode Keyboard with Linear Red Switches, Portabl Compact Grey&Black Keyboard, 68 Keys Mini Keyboard for Mac/Windows, Gamer,Typist,Travel,Trip
features: ✅ [ N-Key Rollover Mechanical Keyboard ] All keys non-conflict. This mechanical gaming keyboards allows multiple keys to work simultaneously with high speed. Let you enjoy high-grade games with fast response

✅ [ Linear Red Switches ] Quiet click sound, fast action with small resistance without a tactile bump feel, gamers often prefer Red switches because they are not as springy, and easier to push down faster

✅ [ Compact 60% Mini Gaming Keyboard ] Small size with 68 keys, save more space for your desk. And this mini gaming keyboard keyboard have the perfect size for travel and fits easily into most bags and backpacks

✅ [ 3 Connection Mode Recharging Keyboard ] This mechanical gaming keyboard support both wired and wireless connections, this gaming keyboard can be connected to your PC, laptop, iPad, phone, and more via a 2.4G USB receiver or B1/B2/B3 modes. You can also charge and play simultaneously with the type-c cable. Connect up to 3 devices simultaneously and switch easily, perfect for home, office, outdoor and casual gaming
✅ [ Ergonomic & Durable Wireless Keyboard ] Smooth lines,comfortable feeling and reduce your hand fatigue. Two-Color injection keycaps make this keyboard more durable and lasting

reviews.title: Constant spring buzzing
reviews.text:
The keyboard is very visually appealing. I do not know if my lack of keyboard knowledge is why I give this 4/5 stars, but there are a few features I do not like. Starting with the positives, the backlight (light blue not changeable) is very appealing and not hard on the eyes, the swappable red switches are nice because I like red, and the linear red switches mean it has a nice click noise when typing. Moving into the cons, there is a bit that is annoying. The most notable, and would probably lower the rating more if I wasn't nice, is the spring noises from the keys. There is a buzzing noise that is left if a key is tapped too hard. This can be fixed by buying lube, but annoying nonetheless. Another feature is the lack of hotkey commands. I write a bit of papers and I usually have multiple tabs open. Trying to hotkey a tab to the left or right side of my screen doesn't work because to use arrow keys, the fn key needs to be held and that doesn't work for the windows hotkey: win+arrow_key. Another annoying hotkey feature is the 'del' key which is fn+n. The n key is in a bit of a bad spot to use the 'delete'' function. Of course, these can all be changed by editing the layers of the keyboard, but it is a long and annoying process that I have not taken the time to do yet. The last issue is the key colors. At night, seeing the gray keys, with the backlight on, is a bit difficult. The second photo attached also has extra keys added, not all of them can be attached to the keyboard because there isn't a spot for it (a bit weird but ok).

Pros:
nice backlight (not changeable color)
clacking linear red switches
extra switch colors

Cons:
Spring noise
keyboard's default button layer
hard to see switches at night

reviews.title: I don't believe but, I got too! I'm looking right at it.
reviews.text:
I didn't expect much for under $23 when I got it at the end of 2022. I figured it I'd get a couple of weeks of fun out of it and figure out if I like the form factor.

When I took it out of the box it didn't look the same as in the photo. Well, you get an extra set of keys! Not every key but, nothing to sneeze at!

It feels good and been holding up well! Other than a squeaky space bar. No issues. Got used to the FN usage and key placement. It's really an amazing value even at $30. I'm sure it's not as premium as the $80+ keyboards but, the value is here!

reviews.title: ASMR keyboard
reviews.text: I LOVE IT!!!! I don't really game but I work in a office and wanted something new and my sister that games showed me this colorful keyboard and I just had to buy it. I am currently using it and I just don't want to stop typing! It has a lot of different color modes and it is just fun to use. I got the white with blue and I would recommend. Also it is loud so keep that in mind.

reviews.title: Looks neat
reviews.text: Awesome 👍😎

reviews.title: Love it
reviews.text: Very satisfied overall - ergonomic, super comfy (for mechanical keyboard lovers), a lot of different light effects. If it was wireless - would be just priceless

reviews.title: Not doublshot
reviews.text:
These two keys: < and > have already worn through. These are not double shot keycaps. They are a semi-translucent keycap with a finish over it that wears through. Doubleshot has an injection molded insert inside the keycap with the translucent area cut out of the keycap.
Should you not care about that, here is some more info. They look okay in the light, but in the dark there is a strong screen glare off of them that can be distracting.

I rate one star for lying about the nature of the product.

reviews.title: eh, cheap.  removed them almost instantly.
reviews.text: slippery, their feel is very cheap and i ended up removing them and regretting my buy.  i have bought other replacment keys before.

reviews.title: I didn't try them...
reviews.text: The color wasn't what I expected so I didn't open the very nice plastic packaging before returning.

reviews.title: DOES NOT FIT CORSAIR STRAFE RGB.
reviews.text: Overall, it's pretty cool. I like it a lot. It is very smudge, and the foil is cheap so it wont last all that long.

reviews.title: Arrived missing key caps but overall pretty good if you have the right keyboard
reviews.text:
Not a keyboard, just key caps to "bling out" your existing keyboard.

I purchased the following keyboard and these key caps fit perfectly. The keyboard (not this item, which is only key caps) comes with a red plastic tool that you can use to pop out the key caps:

Redragon K551 Mechanical Gaming Keyboard RGB LED Rainbow Backlit Wired Keyboard with Red Switches for Windows Gaming PC (104 Keys, Black)

Even the font on the key caps matches the keyboard I bought separately, and the backlighting shines through the font.

The only down side: the set of key caps is missing about 1/4 of the keys (see attached picture).

I would give it all five stars if it had arrived containing all the key caps advertised in the product listing. It was a surprise prank gift for a coworker, which is why I made do with what we got.

title: EPOMAKER Airy 143 Keys ESA Profile ANSI ISO Layout Clear Shine Through Keycaps Set for Mechanical Keyboard, Compatible with MX-Clone Switches Cherry/Gateron/Kailh/Akko/Ajazz Switch(Airy Black)

It also has split spacebar keys that you might need. A keycap set that makes your DIY journey worry-free

reviews.title: Kawaii !!
reviews.text: Comes with all the keys caps you need, love how smooth it feels. You may need to dim your keyboard brightness, found the light through the clear key caps can hurt your eyes after a while.

reviews.title: Exceptionally perfect feel EXCEPT no way to find your position!
reviews.text:
I wanted to love these key caps. They look great! They feel superb and their smooth texture is exactly what I wanted.

However, two major flaws: I didn't even know this was a thing to consider, but they don't have bumps on the positioning keys "F" and "J". So if you type a lot and remove your hands from the keys, you need to look down every time to find your position. This interrupts my workflow as a transcriptionist quite a bit. The other disadvantage is that the smooth feel of the material also makes it impossible to keep skin oil, snack residues, etc. from being left behind on these caps, making them somewhat difficult to grip after the first half hour.

reviews.title: Really nice visual upgrade
reviews.text:
I wanted to upgrade my keyboard’s appearance, and after much Googling I settled on this product. I have a full size 104 key keyboard, and looking at keycaps on various websites makes it seem kinda complicated to know which set I’d need for my specific keyboard (Das Keyboard 4). Some Ctrl keys are wider than others, Spacebars shorter than others, etc. and what I liked about this set is that it includes different length keys and you just use the one that fits your keyboard and ignore the rest.

This is my first set of keycaps so I can’t really speak with any knowledge to the quality of the keys, but I’m really happy with how they look. They feel similar to the ones that came with my keyboard but look muuuuch better.

reviews.title: Fantastic keycap set
reviews.text:
They finally arrived! I plan on putting these keycaps on a 75% keyboard that won't arrive for another couple of months so in the pictures, I only put it on part of my keyboard to test them out. I want to "preserve" that new keycap feeling later. :)

These keycaps are fairly thick and have the standard PBT texture. The doubleshot legends are quite clear and none of the spacebars are warped! This is a new profile I've never typed on and I can't find much information on the web about it so I included a lot of pictures. I compared them in the pictures to my Ducky keyboard with doubleshot ABS. They actually aren't too different from OEM keycap profile (from the Ducky) height but some of the rows are higher. They're much more shapely and the F and J keys have a deeper dish. Compared to DSA keycaps, they don't seem to be quite as deep dishey overall which I actually prefer.
The keycaps fit snug on cherry mx brown stems, more so than my Ducky keycaps. They aren't hard to put on though. Some of the stems have a small part of plastic missing from the MX cross area but it's only a handful of the keycaps and it didn't effect the fit. I've included photos of this as well.
Overall they're great keycaps that I won't be using yet until my keyboard for them arrives.

reviews.title: Nice manual keyboard with a lighter touch.
reviews.text:
This review is for the Pwnage Ultra Custom Mechanical Keyboard: Gateron Optical Switches.

The Package was delivered quickly in perfect condition. In the box was the full-size white keyboard, detachable USB cord, keycap remover, and manual.

Setup was plug and play, no additional drivers needed for Windows 11. The keyboard replaced my 105 key Cherry Blue switch manual black keyboard... which has worked very well with just basic cleaning for 5 years. Compared to my old keyboard this keyboard adds multi color, and some very intense graphics, should you choose to use them... I see videos already posted for this product cycling thru the graphics available so I will just show pictures of the static color I have chosen.

The Red Optical/Manual switches on this keyboard are a little quieter than the blue cherry switches I am used to – but they are by no means quiet…it definitely has the tap, tap, tap sound inherent in all manual keyboards The press seems very easy... much lighter and easier than the blue manual switches I am used to. And so far, I think I prefer the red optical/manual switches on this keyboard. Of course, typing is very subjective to taste and your mileage may vary.

Overall, I can honestly say that I approve of this keyboard, and will keep this one as my everyday keyboard, unless, of course my wife steals it for her home office workstation… she has after all been eyeballing it.

reviews.title: Overall an excellent full size keyboard
reviews.text:
Unboxing was fun. Nicely packaged. Keyboard is nice and large, a little too large for my tastes coming from someone who uses a 65%. But good for every day use and office use with a little side of gaming in the evening. Switches are nice and the RGb effects are plentiful. I think being able to switch the plates easily for those who want a quick easy solution to being able to completely change their keyboard without having to spend the time and money to build a completely custom one one.

Definitely a great full size.

reviews.title: Gaming all the way, I could not use this for extended typing... loudness lol
reviews.text:
This keyboard is very well made, has good heft and stability to it. The keyboard includes a braded USB-C and a key cap remover tool. The keys feel really good when gaming, the input is instantaneous and the feel and travel is really smooth. The only downside for me it is that it is very loud. I use this when my wife is around and she is immediately annoyed, lol, so I only use it when I game on my own. That being said, this is my favorite keyboard. I love all the RGB patterns, (check video). I love the feel of the keys, when I game I feel that is just the right travel distance and feel for my taste. The rear pop out legs help me put this bad boy at the right angle. The finish is really even and dark, the keys are not your typical white on black, it is more of a clear or light grey, this makes the contrast a little harder to see what key is what, so if you don't type well and need to reference the keyboard visually it might be a harder to see. All in all this is a very good entry level keyboard and it is very budget friendly.

+ RGB Great patterns
+ Hefty and stable
+ Silky smooth keys
+ USB-C braded cable
+ Mac / Win compatible
+ Black finish is matte and clean
- Loud Keys

Hope this was helpful!

reviews.title: Beautiful Keyboard
reviews.text:
I was first impressed with this keyboard by the packaging. The flap that secures the box top it held closed by magnets. Unique and impressive.

As to the keyboard, it is beautifully white and has top-of-the-line red key actuators. With these you get a definite "click" when you hit the keys informing you the character has been chosen. The keytops supplied are also all white and they supply a keytop pulling tool, obviously expecting you to switch out some of the keytops to suit your taste, making this superior quality unit fully customized to your taste.

A premium keyboard for those who appreciate true quality in a computer input instrument.

reviews.title: Great and beautiful keyboard
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:784296779c5343262f2f9394390eabd8]] First of all, the packaging box of this keyboard caught my eye. The box was attracted by magnets, which is novelty for me. The keyboard is beautiful, I like the white keyboard because it looks very clean, and there are many kinds of RGB lights, which means that we have many options. It is very comfortable to press the keys and has a good sense of hitting. Meanwhile, the keyboard is a little louder for me. I don't feel it when I play games, but I feel a little noisy when I work, and I'm afraid it will disturb my roommates because our desktops are in the same room, but the sound is within the acceptable range. Overall, I am satisfied with this beautiful and useful keyboard.

reviews.title: Great for the look, 10 key A plus, Functional enough for device swap
reviews.text:
I really wanted this keyboard for the typewriter look, device swap, and 10-key.

The only setback is that even when plugged in via USB to the main device when waking up there is a few seconds of buffering time before being able to type at times. At first, it drove me crazy but now I notice that the green light signals when this is happening and goes solid when ready which alleviates the "let's go" anxiety because I know what's happening. I love that it pairs to 3 devices. 2 via Bluetooth and one via usb.

Another weird thing is maybe at least 1 time a week I have to unplug and plug the keyboard back in when I cannot type on my device and I know that the correct device is selected and the solid green light is on. If there were a better typewriter-style keyboard in all black and chrome with 10-key and pairs to at least 3 devices that don't have the buffering when swapping device or intermittent typing issue, I would have picked it but it doesn't exist.

Overall 4 stars.

Update:

Key caps are already falling apart after 3 months use! My heart is so heavy it’s so noticeable and I cannot find a replacement key hundreds of dollars down the drain.

reviews.title: Keys are dim
reviews.text: I sent mine back because I couldnt see the keys when I was 2 feet away. The backlight shines more between the keys than through them. It was ok in a very dark room but a dim indoor setting they were impossible to see unless you were right over the keyboard, even with the light turned all the way up. They were also kind of wobbly, cant see anyone typing fast on this. I bought a querty writer and the quality difference is huge.

reviews.title: Love the retro feel and "noise"
reviews.text: Love the retro feel and clacking noise.  Typing accuracy has improved!  The ability to switch between 3 devices is extremely convenient!

description: Azio Retro Classic Bluetooth (Elwood) - Luxury Vintage Backlit Mechanical Keyboard, Metallic Brown/Grey (MK-RETRO-W-01B-US)Inspired by vintage typewriters and crafted with ultramodern features, the Azio Retro Classic is the perfect amalgam of past, present and future. features: Product 1: A classic reborn: design originated by vintage typewriters and crafted with ultramodern features, the Azio Retro Classic is the perfect amalgam of past, present, and future.
Product 1: Genuine & luxurious: Genuine leather or wood top plate. Leather reflects taste, craftsmanship, and exclusiveness while emitting a unique charm that inspires.

Product 2: EXQUISITE CRAFTMANSHIP - Immaculate attention to every detail - Genuine leather top cover, textured aluminum wheel and alloy frame with precision bolts. The scroll wheel design starts with a high-grade aluminum rod that is knurled into a diamond-shaped pattern and completed with chamfered edges on a precision CNC lathe. It is then anodized to enhance aesthetics and durability.
Product 2: TRACKS Virtually ANYWHERE - The PixArt PAW3805 sensor is designed to track flawlessly on virtually any surface, including glass and other high-gloss materials.

Product 2: DUAL USB-RF & BLUETOOTH - Interfaces Connect wirelessly with Bluetooth or RF via USB receiver. Works on Bluetooth enabled PC's natively but also includes a USB RF receiver for computers without Bluetooth.

reviews.title: Check Your Computer First
reviews.text:
I sure hated to send this beauty back to Amazon, but I gave it a fair trial and I'm just not satisfied, and here's why.
It's a beautiful piece of machinery/artwork and weighs in at about 10 lbs. The keyboard glows in such a way that it will illuminate your work area in a dark room, and you can adjust the brightness up or down or off.
No, my complaint is with the speed at which it reacts. This keyboard has to keep up with you, possibly in order to mimic an old fashioned Royal or Underwood. I'm used to a $30 Logitech wireless that I can wag to the kitchen with my laptop. I don't like to use the laptop keyboard and scroll pad, I like a separate keyboard, it's faster for me. I find myself correcting errors constantly, and it slows me down, but I'm no stenographer either.
This Azio is Bluetooth, but not all computers support it. My 6 year old Toshiba doesn't, so I have to use the USB connection cord and block a precious port full time.
What a shame, it sure is elegant, and a lot of folks won't care about the perceived lag time.
The star rating posed a problem for me because I'm trying to be honest about my needs and I realize another might be perfectly satisfied.
This brute is expensive, and I'm not inclined to spend north of $700 for a new computer when I don't need one, just to support it.

reviews.title: Good keyboard with one minor catch
reviews.text: Very good keyboard, but it is heavier than I thought.  The height is not easier adjusted so I have to leave my drop down keyboard tray stuck out.

reviews.title: Great Keyboard - Bad Reliability Plus Non-Existent Support
reviews.text: Ordered this roughly a year ago. Started having problems with the mouse within a few months, with the mouse not holding a charge. Got the product replaced under warranty. Replacement mouse never would connect via the USB dongle consistently. 10 months in or so, my keyboard started acting up and, despite being plugged in via USB-C on my desk, continually shows out of power / red light. When I move it to Bluetooth it strangely works, so it can't be out of power. Reached out to Azio support and got crickets. Now have a nearly $200 set of pretty chrome and leather and plastic paperweight. Looks great, fabulous when it work. Sadly that's not very consistently or long. I've got cheap keyboards that lasted multiple years easily.

reviews.title: Not Bad
reviews.text: The keyboard and mouse was packed well for the shipping and arrived in great shape.  Very tactile feel and old school look.

reviews.title: Incorrect Description Information - Wrong item
reviews.text: First off it is very cute and I loved it, but the description says wireless/wired, giving the indication that it can be used wireless and it cannot.  This is a lot of money for a keyboard that has to be plugged in.  Also, I can’t tell how to get in touch with the seller so I can get confirmation.  RETURNING.

reviews.title: OMG great keycap set!
reviews.text:
I have been looking for these sets for the longest time, outside of GB and these guys have made a solid replica. i am so impressed with the quality and feel of these Botanical keycap sets that the premium sets can remain on the shelf. They look so nice and very very close and clean to the originals.

the only way you can tell that they are not GMK is by looking at the bottom. The dye-sub is a little weak in the finish but you never look under the hood.

If you like the greenery landscape or the color great fanatic this is the best set. It's super clean, subtle, and sounds great! I have this set on my KBD67 Lite and it sounds so much better than my ABS keycaps i paid $80 for. The texture is also very nice and I seem to be keen on this rough like texture than the ABS smoother feel. It kind of is matte if that makes sense. The legends on all the alphas are uniform, no thickness issues. The ,.? and other modifiers might have a thinner font but negligible.

I can't say enough what a great first impression these sets have given me and if they produce an "Oblivian" replica i'm jumping on it as well. Pictures to come, after I pickup my desk from all the loose keycaps.

reviews.title: Great sound
reviews.text: Don’t wait years for a gmk set these are just as good lol

reviews.title: Solid
reviews.text: This keyboard and mouse set is solid.  They have a durable aluminum body.  The keys are mechanical in look, but press easy without any noise.  The colors are nice and shine through the keys so you can see which letter it is in the dark.  It gives off just the right amount of light.  They look slick together on a desk and operate well.  Great little set.

reviews.title: Solid
reviews.text: This keyboard and mouse set is solid.  They have a durable aluminum body.  The keys are mechanical in look, but press easy without any noise.  The colors are nice and shine through the keys so you can see which letter it is in the dark.  It gives off just the right amount of light.  They look slick together on a desk and operate well.  Great little set.

reviews.title: Nice keyboard!!
reviews.text:
Updated review.. The mouse quit working after about 12 hours of use. This is disappointing because when it worked it was nice and responsive and was comfortable. When I left the original review everything worked fine..

This keyboard looks and works good. The back lighting makes it easy to see in the dark and the keys are precise and feel good while typing. The real aluminum frame is sturdy and looks good too. The phone holder is a nice touch. I would say it's worth it for the price.

title: MOLGRIA Keycaps Lilith, 130 Set Blue and White Keycaps for Gaming Keyboard, PBT Cherry Profile Dye Sublimation Keycaps with Keycap Puller for Gateron Kailh Cherry MX 104/87/74/61 60% Keyboard
description:
Keyboard Keycaps
Keycap Height: Original Height  KeyCap Material: Matte PBT KeyCap Base Color: Blue and White Printing Technology: Thermal Sublimation
Package
- Basic Kit 104 Keys  - Supplement Kit 26 Keys - Keycap Puller x 1 Compatible with: 108/104/87/61 60% Keyboard, like Cherry MX Switches Mechanical Gaming Keyboard and Outemu, Kailh and Gateron switches and fit most standard ANSI keyboard.
features: 【DURABLE】Made from PBT materials with ergonomic ladder design and Cherry profile height, it’s anti-grease to ensure better using experience.
【TEXTURED】Matte PBT thermal sublimation keyboard keycaps with smooth grainy texture feeling, it’s fingerprints proof, prevent sweat and oil stick.
【UNIQUE】The main theme of the keyboard key caps Dye with Mech Style we call it Lilith, the base keycaps Blue and White, very unique and beautiful for your keyboard.
【COMPATIBLE】130 set keycaps is compatible for full keys 108/104 and 87/61/60 keyboards keycap refresh, including 26 supplement keys for replacement.

【NOTICE】: There only comes with 130 keycaps and a keycap puller, not including the keyboard, it’s compatible for almost all cherry MX switch keyboard the original keycap spacebar size is 6.25u, not compatible for some keyboard as HHKB Corsair and Logitech.

reviews.title: As expected
reviews.text: I was a bit wary because it's dye sub but the printing was perfect and came in exactly 2 weeks from China. Definitely better than the Akko EVA especially since the color on the Akko's are very noticeably lighter then pictures. I returned them the next day

title: DROP + Matt3o MT3 Susuwatari Custom Keycap Set, ABS Hi-Profile Keycaps, Doubleshot Legends, Cherry MX Compatible Set for Ortholinear Mechanical Keyboards (Ortholinear)
features: A GROUNDBREAKING PROFILE, BACK FOR MORE: Sculpted in Hi-Profile, Matt3o’s groundbreaking MT3 /dev/tty custom keycap set changed the way we type.

FROM THE IBM TERMINAL TO THE DESKTOP: Based on the profile form the iconic IBM beamspring terminals of the 1970s, this custom set is fully sculpted in Hi-Profile. From its heavily slanted design to the scooped, contoured tops of each cap, the set recreates the feel of vintage keyboards.

DOUBLESHOT LEGENDS: As opposed to a dye-sublimiation process, these doubleshot legends are permanently molded inside the keycap, thus becoming an integral part of it. This ensures reliable legends and continuity throughout the set.
ORTHOLINEAR: For ortho keyboards like the Drop Planck, Preonic, and other boards with similar layouts.
SPECS: Produced by Drop and designed by Matt3o, ABS Hi-Profile MT3 keycaps, Doubleshot legends, MX compatible, and Fully sculpted based on IBM beamspring keycaps.

reviews.title: Absolute necessity on ortholinear boards
reviews.text:
These keycaps are thick, double shot so they will never fade, and sculpted. With ortholinear keyboards, these keycaps really help adjusting to smaller modifer key size and different key layout.

Pros:
1. Thick: This helps lower the pitch of the sound, which makes it sound quieter.
2. Doubleshot ABS: No wearing out the legends. The font is also fairly thick, making it much more legible than some other keycaps.
3. MT3 profile: The sculpted profile really makes it very comfortable to use and helps reduce hitting the wrong keys. No sharp edges due to the spherical shape. Very enjoyable for typing. The profile is much higher though so that could be an issue for some people.
4. Multiple profile options for certain keys: For example, the Ctrl and Esc keycs come in profiles that would allow it to be the top row or 3rd row. Space bar comes as two 1u, two 1.5u, and one 2u.
5. Storage tray and box: This seems silly to put as a pro but the tray and box it comes with make it easy to store unused or keycaps it replaced. Other Keycaps come in a zip lock bag that will just be a jumbled mess.

Cons:
1. Price. This is really expensive for a set of keycaps but this is the normal price for any specialty keycaps. It is what it is.
2. Limitation of scultped profile: Putting key profiles meant for row 1 in row 3 feels awkward so you might end you designing your keymap partially based on keycap profiles. Also might end up rotating some keycaps like row 5 Raise or Lower layer keycaps to make it more comfortable.
3. ABS option only. The PBT version is in white only. So if you prefer the color with the material that it isn't made it, then you're out of luck.
4. Limited to buying sets if you need extra keys: If you need more keys, you have to order a set. I would like to have more 1.5u blank keycaps but don't want to buy multiple sets just for the few pieces I want.

reviews.title: I like them
reviews.text:
These are my daily drivers, I use them on a Drop CTRL with Glorious Panda switches. Initially I thought the MT3 profile was disorienting, but after using them for a while, I am quite fond of it. I acknowledge that not everyone will like this profile though, and that should be considered if you are buying this product (or any like it). If you can find an MT3 set to try first before dumping about two hundred dollars on keycaps, it would be a **very good** idea. Other things go without saying, the thickness is very good the weight on my switches feels good and not like its making keys too easy to press or anything. I really like the theme, but all of that considered, I bought this specifically for the VI keys (hjkl with arrows) because I thought they looked super cool.

The price for these keycaps is a good deterrent for most people, for good reason. However this high of a price is pretty standard for high quality keycaps, as well as the Drop.com-exclusive MT3 profile.

This leads me to the value for money, its expensive and definitely should only be bought if you have a hankering to spend money on some expensive keycaps or you really really like having a specific row of keycaps.
Brightness is a 1 star because they're not shine-through keycaps, as they should be.
Gaming is a 4 star because, like, Sure? nothing about these keycaps keep you from gaming.

reviews.title: Best 3rd party caps I've ever owned.
reviews.text:
I really liked the esthetics of these key caps because I was looking for something which resembled "Old Nasa" feel, and these were the best I could find. The ergonomics were also great and everything has a very nice and snug fit, unlike the original keycaps that came with my CTRL keyboard.

I only wish that the "additional" buttons came with the normal key caps for the money I spent on the original "package". $30 for about 10 extra keys I can use on my ten keyless is VERY steep.

reviews.title: Best keycap set
reviews.text: I love this set. Worth every penny.

reviews.title: Absolutely gorgeous
reviews.text: Wonderful keycaps , goes great on my Nyquist Keyboard, looks professional yet custom, I highly recommend.

title: Black Keycaps Cherry Profile Doubleshot WOB Keycaps Set 132 Keys Custom Keycaps for Cherry MX Gateron Kailh Switches Mechanical Keyboards
features: 🎉【Doubleshot Keycaps】These black keyboard keycaps are made by high-quality material and double shot technology,the legends are clear and never fade with a good looking font,excellent to touch.

🎉【Durability】This black keycap set can provide top-notch durability and a great feel for your typing,you can custom keyboard to your preference.The thickened keycaps wall makes the cherry profile keycaps more sturdy and durable.These gaming keycaps also provide the fun of free matching for your keyboard keycaps.
🎉【Cherry Profile Keycaps】These mechanical keyboard keycaps are ergonomically designed.The suspended cherry keycap and curved layout bring you a lasting comfortable typing or gaming experience.

🎉【Custom Keycaps】These black wob keycaps suitable for 60% 65% 70% 75% 80% 96% (61 64 68 84 75 87 96 98 104 108) keyboards like rk61,rk68,gk64,gk61,rk84, gh60,etc.These doubleshot keycaps are compatible with cherry mx,gateron,kailh,outemu and any key switches with cross-shaped switches.It is a good choice for you to DIY your mechanical keyboard.

🎉【What You Get】132 cherry profile key caps,keycap puller and our friendly customer service.If you receive a product with missing or defective keycaps,please contact us and we will replace the keycaps for you free of charge.

reviews.title: Great looks, less great feel
reviews.text: These are supposedly double shot ABS keycaps, and they are for sure double shot, but they have the smoothest texture I've ever felt on a keycap. Think painted ABS gaming keyboard keycaps, that smooth if not even smoother. They don't sound half bad. I think the stems could fit stabilizers a little better seeing as if I push a bit too hard on one side the other lifts up at times. I can't complain much further considering I paid $27 for these after a discount and you get what you pay for. Overall I'd say they're worth the money, but don't go expecting super high quality or anything.

reviews.title: What a Fantastic Bargain
reviews.text:
I don't normally write reviews, but I liked this set and decided to pull the trigger on a product that barely had any reviews. I bought this yesterday and installed the keys a day later. I put these keys on my Glorious Pro keyboard and am in love. Now my experience is limited to the Kinetic Labs Whale keycap set and a cheap knock off from the China Amazon that are in OEM height, so not a direct comparison. These keys have the same build quality and sound as the Kinetic Labs set at almost 1/3 of the price.

I'm not an expert but I did take a picture of the spacebars and it does appear that the blue version may be warped slightly or disfigured, I don't know. I took the picture incase it helped. Outside of that, to my untrained eye everything else looked perfect. Gorgeous set.

I liked the options this seller had in other keycap sets, so I used this set as a trial run and was not disappointed. I will be looking to order other colors in the future.

title: Kraken Coiled Keyboard Cable - Artisan Coiled USB C Cable with Aviator Connector for Mechanical Gaming Keyboards (Pure White)
features: Premium Artisan Designs in colors to fit every gaming setup!
Heavy Duty 5 Pin Aviator Connector (Easy to connect, and looks AMAZING)
Double Sleeved for enhanced looks and durability!
5 Feet long to reach your keyboard anywhere in your setup

reviews.title: Excellent quality cable and connectors, but color is more purple than blue
reviews.text:
Update: Oddly enough, this did not work with a Drop Alt keyboard. It worked with a few other keyboards just fine though. Just a word of warning for anyone pairing this cable with a Drop Alt (or maybe any other Drop keyboard).

This is the third coiled cable I have ordered, and it's definitely the best quality overall. The cable itself is thick and good quality. The coil is a bit firm, but nothing too unusual. The intermediate connector is all metal and heavy. Both sides of the intermediate connector can be unthreaded: The side going to the USB-C connector, and the side going to the USB connector.

One interesting thing I noticed was that the end connectors have a color matched almost shrink wrap thickness strain protection around them. The USB side is the most noticeable, and the USB-C side is a bit thicker. As long as there is enough strain protection, I actually prefer the less bulky end connections.

The only nit is the color. Even though it looked dark purplish in the product listing, I was hoping that it would be more blue in real life. It's not, it's an attractive dark purple. I would assume the color represented in the product listing is accurate, in case you're wondering if there is any color variation from the listing photos to real life.
